hooks.command: input=$(cat /dev/stdin); cmd=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(rm\s+-[rRf]*f|rm\s+-[rRf]*r|rmdir|:\s*>\s*\S|dd\s+if=|mkfs|fdisk)'; then echo "WARNING: Destructive command detected. Review before proceeding: $cmd"; fi

input=$(cat /dev/stdin); path=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [ -n "$path" ] && [ -s "$path" ]; then echo "WARNING: Overwriting existing file with content: $path"; fi
# Replace with your lint command, e.g.: npm run lint --fix
